name: Chocolate Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the bread machine and press the button to mix.
2. If using two loaf pans instead of a bread machine, combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Knead the dough until smooth, then place it in greased loaf pans.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Allow to cool slightly before removing from pans and serving warm with cream cheese.
